title: UObject Lifecycle & GC
description: Understand the UObject base class hierarchy, reflection registration, garbage collection, and memory management in Unreal Engine.
learningObjectives: Identify the root classes of the Unreal hierarchy (UObject, AActor)
Explain how the Garbage Collector (GC) runs object sweeps based on reference trees
Prevent garbage collection crashes using UPROPERTY pointers

sections.title: UObject Memory Management
sections.content: In Unreal Engine, native C++ memory management is wrapped by the UObject framework. Objects registered under `UObject` are tracked by a Garbage Collection (GC) system. The GC periodically scans a root object index and sweeps away objects that have no active reflected pointers referencing them. Declaring object pointers with `UPROPERTY()` is mandatory to prevent the GC from sweeping active pointers.

sections.title: UPROPERTY Protection
